steps.title: Set up the proportion
steps.content: Since the ratio 120 to $m$ is equivalent to the ratio 3 to 27, we can write: $$\frac{120}{m} = \frac{3}{27}$$

steps.title: Simplify and solve
steps.content:
Simplify the right side: $\frac{3}{27} = \frac{1}{9}$

So $\frac{120}{m} = \frac{1}{9}$. Cross-multiplying gives $120 \cdot 9 = m$, therefore $m = 1080$.
